curation_notes: Patch commit 869801f removes forced digit insertion from both RandomAlphaNumeric (randomstringutils.go) and CryptoRandomAlphaNumeric (cryptorandomstringutils.go). Both functions had identical vulnerability patterns: after generating a random alphanumeric string, they checked for the presence of a digit and forcibly inserted one if absent, reducing entropy. Both locations are primary (both patched in the same commit). The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-331 Insufficient Entropy) is correct. Note: this GHSA was withdrawn as a duplicate of GHSA-xg2h-wx96-xgxr, but the underlying vulnerability data is the same.
